Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Looking at Case 1 the application flows through all the key steps within the required timeframes credit check happens within 24 hours and the decision is communicated within 48 hours

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The sequence is valid even though documentation is finalized after the applicant is informed

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Theres a minor gap though no follow up call was made which is a desideratum violation

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Now examining Case 2 which has normative violations

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Case 2 runs the risk assessment before the credit check which breaks the required sequence and then skips informing the applicant entirely jumping straight from the loan decision to closing the case

Name: Validation - PE
Text: This means I cant even evaluate the 48 hour timing for notification since that step never happened The credit check itself meets the 24 hour window but the structural violations are significant

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Case 3 follows the correct order and approves the loan before finalizing so its normatively compliant but the credit check takes about 49 hours and the applicant notification stretches to 51 hours both exceeding the desiderata targets

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Theres also no follow up call

Name: Abductive Reasoning - IND
Text: For Case 2 the violations could stem from parallel processing across departments a data entry error or an automated finalization triggered by a template so Id recommend investigating the workflow and implementing controls

Name: Abductive Reasoning - IND
Text: Case 3s delays likely relate to weekend processing the credit check happened on a Sunday with the notification spanning a weekend and MLK Day which explains the backlog

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - IND
Text: For remediation I should outline process fixes like enforcing the correct step ordering adding a blocking rule to prevent documentation finalization after rejection making the applicant notification mandatory implementing SLA monitoring and optionally reminding teams about follow up calls

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - IND
Text: Ill also create a severity classification table to summarize the findings
